summary: Compute Converters are services that perform local computations.
ComputeConverter is a base class for local computation services in MSMetaEnhancer.

Web converters should be created in MSMetaEnhancer/libs/converters/web/ directory. Web converters should be registered in MSMetaEnhancer/libs/converters/web/__init__.py file. Compute converters should be created in MSMetaEnhancer/libs/conve
Converters should define endpoints as a dictionary in their __init__ method.
Converters should define conversions as tuples of source attribute, target attribute, and conversion method.
Compute converters should use asynch=False when creating conversion methods.
Converter developers should always handle API errors gracefully and return empty dictionaries when data is not available.
Converter developers should include docstrings for all methods explaining parameters and return values.
Converter developers should write comprehensive tests including service availability and conversion functionality.
Developers can use @lru_cache decorator for caching responses in converters.
RDKit converter serves as a reference implementation for Compute Converter Template.
